message:
fix(core): set memdb_rows_loaded=false when VDBE DML invalidates memdb rows

After VDBE DML execution through storage cursors (pager/btree), the
MemDatabase rows are stale but memdb_rows_loaded remained true. This
allowed prepared query fast paths (SimpleCountLikePattern, etc.) to
read from stale memdb and return incorrect results (e.g., COUNT=0
when rows exist).

Fix: set memdb_rows_loaded to false in all three VDBE DML completion
paths (explicit txn stale-until-read, autocommit stale, and the
general invalidation path). The next read boundary will trigger a
lazy memdb reload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
